clayBricks.title: Clay Bricks

bcaBlocks.title: BCA Blocks

aggregates.title: Aggregates

redBrick240.name: Red Clay Brick 240x115x63
redBrick240.description: Standard red brick for construction, dimensions 240x115x63mm. Weather-resistant and durable.

solidBrick.name: Solid Red Clay Brick
solidBrick.description: Solid red brick for heavy construction. Superior strength and exceptional durability.

perforatedBrick.name: Perforated Clay Brick
perforatedBrick.description: Brick with holes for thermal insulation. Lightweight and energy efficient.

fireBrick.name: Fire Clay Brick
fireBrick.description: Special brick for fireplaces and ovens. Resistant to high temperatures.

block200.name: BCA Block 600x250x200

adhesive.description: Special adhesive for BCA blocks. Easy application and strong adhesion.

block100.name: BCA Block 600x250x100
block100.description: Thin BCA block for partitions. Reduced weight.

washedSand.description: Clean sand for concrete and plasters. 0-4mm grain size, no impurities.

gravel.name: Gravel 4-16mm

crushedStone.name: Crushed Stone 16-31.5mm
crushedStone.description: Crushed stone for foundations and roads. 16-31.5mm grain size.

riverSand.name: River Sand 0-2mm
